overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective following a large bird of prey flying through mountainous terrain. The clip transitions from a dark overcast canyon to a bright forested hillside, then descends into a misty river canyon. The bird navigates through scattered trees and rocky landscapes with snow-capped peaks visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain canyon with steep cliffs

agents.ego_description: large bird gliding steadily over the canyon with occasional wing beats

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon walls with sparse vegetation
snow-covered mountain range visible in the distance
wooden bridge structure spanning the canyon below
winding dirt road visible on the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The bird flies over a rugged mountain canyon with steep rocky walls. A wooden bridge and dirt path are visible far below. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance under dark overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forested hillside with scattered pines

events.description: screen fades from black revealing bright forest landscape after canyon scene
bird flies directly through pine tree branches temporarily obscuring the camera view

agents.ego_description: bird banking left and right while navigating between scattered pine trees on the hillside

entered.detail: rolling hills covered in golden-brown autumn grass
tall pine trees scattered across the landscape
light atmospheric mist in the valleys between hills

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bright morning over forested hills with scattered pine trees and golden grass. The bird weaves between trees while flying over rolling terrain. Snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background as the bird passes through branches at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty river canyon with steep rocky walls

events.description: bird begins descending sharply into the canyon toward the river below
visibility decreases significantly as bird enters thick mist in the canyon

agents.ego_description: bird gliding downward into the canyon, following the terrain contours toward the river surface

entered.detail: steep rocky cliffs forming the walls of the river canyon
river flowing through the bottom of the canyon
waterfall or rapids visible in the distance along the river
thick forest covering the canyon slopes

segments.scene_description: The bird descends into a deep misty canyon with a river running through it. Rocky cliffs rise on both sides while dense forest covers the slopes. The atmosphere becomes increasingly foggy as the bird glides lower toward the water, with a waterfall visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight that transitions from a dark, rugged mountain canyon into a bright forested hillside before descending into a misty river valley. It begins by gliding over steep rocky walls and a distant wooden bridge under heavy overcast skies, with snow-capped peaks looming in the background. As the lighting shifts to a bright morning, the camera weaves through rolling hills of golden grass and scattered pine trees, passing closely through branches. The scene then shifts downward as the bird descends into a deep canyon, where the bright light gives way to an increasingly foggy atmosphere. Finally, the camera glides lower toward a river flowing between dense forests and rocky cliffs, moving toward a distant waterfall.
